MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Patrick Murray and the Attorney Pamela Palpallatoc to appear on April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a response to the examiner's notes has not been filed. The accounting petition is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
